description: Android-only capabilities (target-gated in Cargo.toml, must not apply on desktop). (1) SAF file access (tauri-plugin-android-fs): the plugin's `android-fs:default` set is `all-without-delete`, which deliberately EXCLUDES every write command — relying on it made live save silently fail (read-only fallback), so we grant the exact least-privilege set the provider uses, writes included. (2) HTTP for the in-app update check: api.github.com for the release lookup, plus github.com + objects.githubusercontent.com so we can resolve the APK asset's final (post-redirect) CDN URL before opening it — Android's downloader stalls on the github.com→CDN redirect otherwise. Desktop uses the native updater instead.
